plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete plan for optimizing `src/pipeline.ts`:

---

## Summary

All 5 functions have O(nВІ)вЂ“O(nвЃґ) bottlenecks that can be eliminated with `Map`-based lookups. Only `src/pipeline.ts` needs to be edited.

### Per-function changes

| Function | Current | Optimized | Key change |
|---|---|---|---|
| `groupByCategory` | O(nВІ) | O(n) | `Map<category, CategoryGroup>` replaces `Array.find()` + `reduce()` |
| `findDuplicates` | O(nвЃґ) | O(n) | Single-pass `Map<key, Transaction[]>`, filter for `length в‰Ґ 2` вЂ” eliminates the nested loops entirely |
| `calculateRunningBalance` | O(nВІ log n) | O(n log n) | Filter once, sort once, single accumulation pass вЂ” no more re-filtering/re-sorting per position |
| `topSpenders` | O(nВІ + mВІ) | O(n + m log m) | `Map<userId, {total,count}>` in one pass; replace bubble sort with built-in `.sort()` |
| `searchTransactions` | O(nВІ) | O(n) | Create `RegExp` once before the loop; remove the unnecessary dedup scan |
| `processAll` | вЂ” | вЂ” | No changes needed; inherits all improvements |

### Verification
```bash
npx vitest run
```
Both `tests/pipeline.test.ts` (correctness) and `tests/performance.test.ts` (thresholds) should pass.
